data.title: Venezuela Nears End of Interest Rate Cut Cycle, Interim President Says
data.description: Venezuela's interim President, Rodriguez, announced that the country is approaching the end of the interest rate cut cycle that began in 2024. According to Jin10, Rodriguez stated that the upcoming monetary policy decision will consider implementing the final rate cut of this cycle.

data.title: Czech National Bank's Bitcoin Reserve Strategy Defended by Governor
data.description: Czech National Bank Governor Aleš Michl has defended the bank's decision to allocate 1% of its reserves to Bitcoin, describing it as a conservative yet innovative approach. According to NS3.AI, Michl highlighted that the bank's research indicates a low long-term correlation between Bitcoin and traditional reserve assets. This strategy is expected to enhance returns in Czech Koruna terms without elevating overall portfolio risk. The bank currently manages approximately $180 billion in foreign exchange reserves, which is about 44% of the Czech Republic's GDP. Michl linked this move to a broader strategy that combines strict inflation control with calculated exposure to non-traditional assets.

data.title: Ethereum's Value Tied to Its Ecosystem's Resilience
data.description:
The value of Ethereum, the second-largest cryptocurrency, is becoming more reliant on the strength of the applications and platforms built on its blockchain. According to Bloomberg, this dependency highlights the importance of the broader ecosystem in sustaining Ethereum's market position.

Ethereum's blockchain supports a wide range of decentralized applications and smart contracts, which are crucial to its functionality and appeal. The success and stability of these applications directly influence Ethereum's value, making the ecosystem's resilience a key factor in its market performance.

data.title: PUMP Tokens Burned to Enhance Ecosystem Trust
data.description: BWENEWS AI has announced the complete burn of all PUMP tokens previously bought back, amounting to approximately $370 million, which represents about 36% of the total supply. According to BWEnews, the organization has also committed to a programmatic buyback and burn of 50% of its revenue over the next year. This initiative aims to bolster trust and sustainability within the ecosystem. The current market capitalization of PUMP is reported to be $1.174 billion, although this figure may not be entirely accurate.

data.title: RedStone Introduces Settlement Layer for Tokenized Assets in DeFi
data.description: RedStone has unveiled RedStone Settle, a new settlement layer aimed at integrating over $30 billion worth of tokenized real-world assets into DeFi lending as collateral. According to NS3.AI, this initiative seeks to bridge the gap between the rapid liquidation processes in DeFi and the extended redemption periods, ranging from 60 to 180 days, associated with many tokenized funds and bonds.

data.title: Venezuela's Interim President Expects Inflation to Approach 3% Target Despite Recent Price Rebound
data.description: Venezuela's Interim President Rodriguez stated that despite the recent rebound in prices for some fruits and vegetables, inflation is expected to gradually decline towards the 3% target. According to Jin10, this outlook reflects the government's efforts to stabilize the economy and manage inflationary pressures.

data.title: U.S. API Crude Oil Inventory Shows Unexpected Decline
data.description: The American Petroleum Institute (API) reported a decrease in U.S. crude oil inventories for the week ending April 24. According to Jin10, the inventory fell by 1.793 million barrels, contrary to the expected increase of 271,000 barrels. The previous week's data showed a decline of 4.47 million barrels.

data.title: Ostium Enhances Backend with Decentralized Execution Layer
data.description: Ostium has upgraded its backend infrastructure and introduced a new decentralized execution layer following the processing of over $50 billion in cumulative trading volume. According to NS3.AI, the recent rollout includes offchain hedging partners such as Jump, along with other unnamed prime brokers and major institutions, to manage directional exposure from user trades. Ostium stated that this development maintains users' self-custodial status while aiming to expand open interest and enhance execution quality.

data.title: AI TRENDS | DeepMind Veteran Raises $1.1 Billion for New AI Venture
data.description: David Silver, a veteran of DeepMind, has successfully raised $1.1 billion for his new venture, Ineffable Intelligence, which is now valued at $5.1 billion. According to NS3.AI, Silver announced that the startup will focus on reinforcement learning and simulation-based self-play, diverging from the trend of using large language models trained on human-generated data.

data.title: Canada Revises GDP Growth Forecasts for 2026-2029
data.description: The Canadian government has announced revised projections for the country's real GDP growth over the next few years. According to Jin10, the government now expects real GDP to grow by 1.1% in 2026, a slight decrease from the 1.2% forecast made in November of last year. For 2027, the growth is projected at 1.9%, down from the previous estimate of 2.0%. The forecast for 2028 remains unchanged at 1.9%, while the 2029 projection has been adjusted to 1.9% from the earlier estimate of 2.0%. The government also noted that the real GDP is not expected to return to pre-tariff levels.

data.title: Canada's Economic Growth and Rising Oil Prices Improve Fiscal Outlook
data.description: The Canadian government has announced that stronger-than-expected economic growth and rising oil prices have contributed to an improvement in the country's fiscal situation. According to Jin10, these factors have positively impacted Canada's financial health, leading to a more favorable fiscal outlook. The government highlighted the role of robust economic performance and the oil market's upward trend in enhancing fiscal conditions.

data.title: Citadel Gains Approval to Operate in Dubai
data.description: Citadel has received the necessary approval to commence operations in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. According to NS3.AI, this development marks a significant step for Citadel as it expands its presence in the Middle East. The approval allows Citadel to tap into the growing financial market in Dubai, which is known for its strategic location and business-friendly environment. This move is expected to enhance Citadel's global footprint and provide new opportunities for growth in the region.

data.title: Paul Tudor Jones: Bitcoin as Superior Inflation Hedge Due to Scarcity
data.description: Paul Tudor Jones has identified Bitcoin as the optimal hedge against inflation, emphasizing its limited supply which renders it more scarce than gold. According to NS3.AI, Jones expressed concerns over the valuation of U.S. stocks, highlighting a stock market capitalization-to-GDP ratio of approximately 252%. He noted that the current valuations of the S&P suggest negative returns over the next decade.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 2,300 USDT with a 0.57% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 28, 2026, 19:46 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 2,300 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 2,301.629883 USDT, with a narrowed 0.57% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Ethereum Surpasses 2300 USDT with 24-Hour Growth
data.description: Ethereum has recently exceeded the 2300 USDT mark, according to Odaily. The current price stands at 2300.45 USDT, reflecting a 0.5% increase over the past 24 hours.

data.title: River CEO Highlights Bitcoin's Growing Acceptance in 50 Countries
data.description: River CEO Alex Leishman noted that over the past five years, 50 countries have become more receptive to Bitcoin. According to NS3.AI, Leishman described Bitcoin banking as a viable alternative to traditional finance, which he likened to gambling. He pointed out that mainstream financial applications are increasingly integrating investing, prediction markets, and betting features, which may encourage users to engage in high-risk activities.

data.title: Alchemy and Privy Integrate to Enhance Onchain Finance App Experience
data.description: Alchemy and Privy have announced a new technical integration aimed at streamlining the user experience for onchain finance applications. According to NS3.AI, this collaboration merges Privy's onboarding tools with Alchemy's gasless transaction infrastructure into a single developer stack. The integration is designed to minimize signup and transaction friction by incorporating embedded wallets, email or social logins, and single-click transaction flows. This initiative seeks to simplify the process for users engaging with onchain finance apps, potentially increasing user adoption and satisfaction.

data.title: Stablecoin Policy Shifts Focus to Intermediaries in $320 Billion Market
data.description: Stablecoin policy under CLARITY and GENIUS is shifting the debate from direct holder yield to the intermediaries capturing digital-dollar economics. According to NS3.AI, this change comes as the stablecoin market reached approximately $320 billion in supply by mid-April. The largest payment-stablecoin rails mentioned include USDT, with a market capitalization of about $189.71 billion, and USDC, with approximately $77.63 billion.

data.title: Lightspark Introduces Grid Global Accounts for Enhanced Banking Services
data.description: Lightspark has unveiled Grid Global Accounts, a comprehensive banking solution designed to enable platforms to provide branded dollar accounts, stablecoin conversion, Visa debit cards, and foreign exchange services across more than 65 countries. According to NS3.AI, this innovative product allows businesses to issue their own stablecoins and facilitates instant conversion between dollars, stablecoins, and Bitcoin within the account. Additionally, Lightspark highlighted that Grid can establish controlled operating pockets for AI agents, enhancing operational efficiency.

data.title: CFTC Sues Wisconsin to Reassert Jurisdiction Over Prediction Markets
data.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has filed a lawsuit against the state of Wisconsin on April 28, 2026, following the state's civil suits against five prediction market companies. According to NS3.AI, the CFTC aims to reaffirm its exclusive jurisdiction over prediction markets through this legal action. This dispute holds significance for platforms utilizing blockchain technology, tokenized products, or decentralized market structures, as it could impact their regulatory landscape.
